SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, ANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHUKOVA, MIKHAIL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ANNIE WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL ZHUKOVA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, ANNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHUKOVA, MIKHAIL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
